Notice Of Motion And Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment
Off Calendar May-27-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Hearing Re: PLAINTIFF GABRIEL ESPINOZA's Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Granted. No opposition filed and the settlement complies with the requirements for Proposition 65 settlements.

Order submitted. Consent judgment submitted.

Judge: Harold E. Kahn; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (301/HEK)
